import{useEffect,useRef,useState}from'react';/**
 * Observes an element; sets visible to true once it enters the viewport.
 * Disconnects after first intersection (default) to avoid extra work.
 */export function useInView(){let threshold=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:0.12;let rootMargin=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:'0px 0px -8% 0px';const ref=useRef(null);const[visible,setVisible]=useState(false);useEffect(()=>{const el=ref.current;if(!el)return undefined;const observer=new IntersectionObserver(_ref=>{let[entry]=_ref;if(entry.isIntersecting){setVisible(true);observer.disconnect();}},{threshold,rootMargin});observer.observe(el);return()=>observer.disconnect();},[threshold,rootMargin]);return[ref,visible];}
